title: SoroSuub (CNVYR)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Sorosuub_cnvyr.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Modular conveyor|Modular Conveyor]] ''SoroSuub 1'' firing at attacking [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wings]].]]
[[Modular conveyor]]s '''''SoroSuub''''' served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] fleet at the [[Battle for Honor]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Conveyors ''SoroSuub'' headed for [[XQ1 Platform]] ''[[DS 5]]'' midway through the battle, attempting to resupply the stranded [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] and his [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']]. Imperial forces had positioned themselves near the jump point where Conveyors ''SoroSuub'' and additional [[Transport/Legends|transports]] exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] destroyed ''SoroSuub'' with [[Proton rocket/Legends|proton rockets]], along with the rest of the arriving convoy.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
